title: Who wants to be a ‘Millionaire’? Berkshires town keeps its divisive mascot following vote
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Education A recent poll on the unusual mascot found no “clear or decisive consensus” within Lenox’s school community.
Shutterstock ShareSend this article to your social connections.
Lenox will keep its controversial “Millionaires” mascot after students and families came out divided on whether to buck the ritzy moniker or embrace their Berkshires town’s Gilded Age tradition.
